### ❌ ITEM 5: Tests: backend/app/models.py

**Status**: PENDING  
**Goal**: TDD — escribe los tests ANTES que el código de producción.
Módulo a probar: backend/app/models.py
- test_note_model_creates_valid_instance: Creating a Note SQLAlchemy model instance with valid title and optional content should succeed and set all fields correctly.
- test_note_model_requires_title_field: Creating a Note SQLAlchemy model instance without a title should raise an error due to NOT NULL constraint.
- test_note_model_content_nullable: Creating a Note SQLAlchemy model instance with content set to None should succeed and store null in the database.
- test_note_model_created_at_auto_now: The created_at field should be automatically set to the current timestamp when a Note is created.

**Status**: PENDING  
**Goal**: TDD — escribe los tests ANTES que el código de producción.
Módulo a probar: backend/app/schemas.py
- test_note_base_schema_valid: NoteBase Pydantic schema should validate with required title and optional content.
- test_note_base_schema_missing_title: NoteBase Pydantic schema should raise a validation error if title is missing.
- test_note_create_schema_inherits_note_base: NoteCreate schema should accept all fields from NoteBase and validate them.

- test_note_schema_content_optional: Note schema should allow content to be omitted or set to None.

**Status**: PENDING  
**Goal**: TDD — escribe los tests ANTES que el código de producción.
Módulo a probar: frontend/src/api/notes.js
- test_note_interface_accepts_valid_fields: Note interface should accept all required fields: id, title, created_at, and optional content.
- test_note_interface_content_optional: Note interface should allow content to be omitted or set to null.
- test_note_base_interface_requires_title: NoteBase interface should require the title field and throw a type error if missing.
- test_note_create_interface_extends_note_base: NoteCreate interface should accept all fields from NoteBase and allow optional content.
- test_note_interface_created_at_format: Note interface created_at field should be a string in ISO 8601 format.

### ❌ ITEM 9: Tests: backend/app/main.py

**Status**: PENDING  
**Goal**: TDD — escribe los tests ANTES que el código de producción.
Módulo a probar: backend/app/main.py
- test_healthcheck_returns_200_and_status_ok: GET /health must return 200 and a JSON body indicating service health (e.g., {'status': 'ok'})
- test_cors_headers_present_on_all_endpoints: All endpoints must include CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-Origin) in responses
- test_startup_runs_alembic_migrations_and_seeding: On startup, Alembic migrations and DB seeding must be executed (can be verified by checking seeded data exists after startup)
- test_missing_required_env_var_causes_startup_failure: If a required environment variable (e.g., DATABASE_URL) is missing, app startup must fail with a clear error
- test_structured_logging_on_request: Each API request must produce a structured log entry containing method, path, status_code, and timestamp

- test_create_note_with_title_and_content_returns_note: create_note with valid title and content must return a Note object with id, title, content, and created_at

### ❌ ITEM 15: Tests: frontend/src/hooks/useNotes.js

**Status**: PENDING  
**Goal**: TDD — escribe los tests ANTES que el código de producción.
Módulo a probar: frontend/src/hooks/useNotes.js
- fetches notes on mount and sets notes state: useNotes should fetch notes from GET /notes on mount and set notes state with the response array
- sets loading true while fetching notes: useNotes should set loading=true while fetching notes and loading=false after fetch completes
- sets error state if GET /notes fails: useNotes should set error state if GET /notes returns a network or server error
- createNote adds new note to notes state on success: useNotes.createNote should POST to /notes and add the returned note to notes state on 200 response
- createNote sets error if POST /notes fails: useNotes.createNote should set error state if POST /notes fails (e.g. validation error or network error)
- deleteNote removes note from notes state on success: useNotes.deleteNote should DELETE /notes/{id} and remove the note from notes state on 204 response

## Original Development Plan

<details>
<summary>Click to expand full development plan</summary>

```markdown
# DEVELOPMENT PLAN: notes-app

## 1. ARCHITECTURE OVERVIEW

**Components:**
- **Backend:** FastAPI (Python 3.11), SQLAlchemy 2.0, Alembic, PostgreSQL 15
- **Frontend:** React 18 (JavaScript, Vite), Axios
- **Database:** PostgreSQL 15 (Dockerized)
- **Containerization:** Docker, docker-compose
- **Infrastructure:** Healthchecks, .env, run.sh, README, docs

**Models:**
- **Note:** id (int, PK, auto-increment), title (string, required), content (text, optional), created_at (timestamp)
- **Pydantic Models:** NoteBase, NoteCreate, Note (with model_config for from_attributes)
- **Frontend Types:** NoteBase, NoteCreate, Note (JS interfaces)

**APIs:**
- **POST /notes:** Create note
- **GET /notes:** List all notes (desc by created_at)
- **GET /notes/{id}:** Get note by id
- **DELETE /notes/{id}:** Delete note by id
- **GET /health:** Health check

**Folder Structure:**
```
project-root/
├── backend/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── main.py
│   │   ├── models.py
│   │   ├── schemas.py
│   │   ├── crud.py
│   │   ├── database.py
│   │   ├── deps.py
│   │   └── config.py
│   ├── alembic/
│   │   ├── env.py
│   │   ├── script.py.mako
│   │   └── versions/
│   ├── Dockerfile
│   └── start.sh
├── frontend/
│   ├── public/
│   │   └── index.html
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── api/
│   │   │   └── notes.js
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   │   ├── NoteList.jsx
│   │   │   ├── NoteForm.jsx
│   │   │   └── NoteItem.jsx
│   │   ├── hooks/
│   │   │   └── useNotes.js
│   │   ├── App.jsx
│   │   └── main.jsx
│   ├── Dockerfile
│   └── start.sh
├── docker-compose.yml
├── .env.example
├── .gitignore
├── .dockerignore
├── run.sh
├── README.md
└── docs/
    └── architecture.md
```

## 2. ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

1. **End-to-end note management:** User can create, view, and delete notes via the frontend UI; all actions persist to the PostgreSQL database and are reflected in the UI without page reload.
2. **API contract compliance:** All backend endpoints (`POST /notes`, `GET /notes`, `GET /notes/{id}`, `DELETE /notes/{id}`) accept and return data matching the specified Pydantic/JS interfaces, with robust input validation and error handling.
3. **Zero manual setup:** After cloning and running `./run.sh`, all services (frontend, backend, database) are healthy, seeded with 3–5 example notes, and the app is accessible at `http://localhost:3000` (frontend) and `http://localhost:8000` (backend API).

## TEAM SCOPE (MANDATORY — PARSED BY THE PIPELINE)
Every executable item MUST include exactly one line at the end of the item block (after Validation):
**Role:** <role_id> (<category>)

---

## 3. EXECUTABLE ITEMS

---

### ITEM 1: Foundation — shared types, interfaces, DB schemas, config
**Goal:** Create all foundational code and contracts for backend and frontend: SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, frontend JS interfaces, and backend config. All other items import from these files.
**Files to create:**
- backend/app/models.py (create) — SQLAlchemy Note model
- backend/app/schemas.py (create) — Pydantic models: NoteBase, NoteCreate, Note (with model_config)
- frontend/src/api/notes.js (create) — JS interfaces: NoteBase, NoteCreate, Note (JSDoc typedefs)
- backend/app/config.py (create) — Environment variable validation (pydantic_settings), constants
**Dependencies:** None
**Validation:** 
- `python -c "from app.models import Note as NoteModel"` runs without error
- `python -c "from app.schemas import Note, NoteCreate"` runs without error
- `python -c "from app.config import settings"` loads and validates env vars
- `cat frontend/src/api/notes.js` shows all required typedefs
**Role:** role-tl (technical_lead)

---

### ITEM 2: Backend Service — FastAPI app, CRUD endpoints, DB, Alembic, healthcheck, logging, seeding
**Goal:** Implement the FastAPI backend service with all endpoints (`POST /notes`, `GET /notes`, `GET /notes/{id}`, `DELETE /notes/{id}`, `GET /health`), database session management, CRUD logic, Alembic migrations, auto-seeding, structured logging, error handling, and CORS. Ensure robust input validation and environment variable enforcement.
**Files to create:**
- backend/app/main.py (create) — FastAPI app entry, endpoint registration, healthcheck, startup event for Alembic migration & seeding, CORS, logging
- backend/app/crud.py (create) — CRUD functions: get_note, get_notes, create_note, delete_note
- backend/app/database.py (create) — SQLAlchemy engine, session, Base, connection pooling
- backend/app/deps.py (create) — get_db dependency
- backend/app/__init__.py (create) — package marker
- backend/alembic/env.py (create) — Alembic environment setup (integrates with SQLAlchemy models)
- backend/alembic/script.py.mako (create) — Alembic migration template
- backend/alembic/versions/<timestamp>_initial.py (create) — Initial migration for notes table
- backend/start.sh (create) — Entrypoint: wait for DB, run Alembic upgrade, start FastAPI
- backend/Dockerfile (create) — Multi-stage, non-root, runs start.sh, exposes 8000, CMD: uvicorn app.main:app
**Dependencies:** Item 1
**Validation:** 
- `docker build -t notes-backend ./backend` succeeds
- `docker run --env-file .env -p 8000:8000 notes-backend` starts, runs migrations, seeds DB, `/health` returns 200
- All endpoints respond with correct schema and error handling
**Role:** role-be (backend_developer)

---

### ITEM 3: Frontend Service — React SPA, notes list, create, delete, API integration, state management
**Goal:** Implement the React frontend SPA: display list of notes, create note form, delete button per note, state management via useNotes hook, API integration with backend, error/loading UI, and healthcheck. All UI and API code must match the data contracts and component/hook signatures.
**Files to create:**
- frontend/public/index.html (create) — HTML entry point
- frontend/src/main.jsx (create) — React entry point, renders App
- frontend/src/App.jsx (create) — Main app component, layout, integrates NoteList and NoteForm
- frontend/src/api/notes.js (update) — API client: getNotes, getNote, createNote, deleteNote (using Axios, matches backend contract)
- frontend/src/hooks/useNotes.js (create) — Custom hook: manages notes state, loading, error, createNote, deleteNote, deletingId
- frontend/src/components/NoteList.jsx (create) — List of notes, delete handler, deletingId prop
- frontend/src/components/NoteForm.jsx (create) — Note creation form, onSubmit, loading prop
- frontend/src/components/NoteItem.jsx (create) — Single note display, onDelete, deleting prop
- frontend/start.sh (create) — Entrypoint: npm install, npm run dev
- frontend/Dockerfile (create) — Multi-stage: node:20-alpine builder → nginx:alpine serve, ARG VITE_API_URL, exposes 3000

**Validation:** 
- `docker build -t notes-frontend ./frontend` succeeds

**Goal:** Provide complete orchestration and documentation for local development: docker-compose.yml (all services, healthchecks, depends_on), .env.example (all variables), .gitignore, .dockerignore, run.sh (builds, waits for healthy, prints URLs), README.md (setup, usage, endpoints), and docs/architecture.md (system diagram, component descriptions).
```
